report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Crypto Wallet Security & Scam Protection Guide 2026 (with interactive Security Score Calculator) and Crypto Market Cycles Guide 2026 — both with full SEO metadata, structured data, and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Crypto wallet security: $311M drained by phishing in January 2026 alone. Approval drainer attacks are the #1 high-impact vector. Modern phishing targets signatures and approvals, not passwords. Wallet firewalls now intercept at 3 layers: pre-connect, pre-sign, post-permission.
Key security tools: Revoke.cash (approval management), Scam Sniffer (phishing detection), Pocket Universe & Blowfish (tx simulation), Rabby (built-in simulation), MetaMask security layer.

Attack vectors researched: unlimited token approvals, ice phishing (malicious permits), address poisoning, fake browser extensions, social engineering via Discord/Telegram, honeypot tokens, fake airdrops.
Crypto market cycles: Bitcoin ATH $126,296 on Oct 6, 2025 — declined 46.7% to ~$67,550 by Feb 2026. Four-year halving cycle (2012, 2016, 2020, 2024) with next halving in 2028.

Cycle debate: halvings vs global liquidity as primary driver. Many analysts argue global liquidity now matters more for a $2.5T asset class. On-chain indicators: MVRV, NUPL, Pi Cycle Top, Puell Multiple, RHODL, Stock-to-Flow.

Current positioning: institutional demand (ETFs) providing steady bid, SEC commodity classification of 16 tokens (March 17, 2026) adds clarity, long-term holders distributing — tug-of-war between accumulation and distribution.
Gap analysis confirmed: no existing degen0x guides on wallet security/scam protection or market cycle phases. Both are high search-intent beginner/intermediate topics.

sections.title: Content Created
items: /learn/crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026 — ~570 lines, Beginner level, covers: 2026 threat landscape ($311M stat), 8 attack vectors (drainers, phishing, ice phishing, address poisoning, fake extensions, social engineering, honeypots, fake airdrops), token approval mechanics, 3-layer wallet firewall defense, security tools comparison table (Revoke.cash, Rabby, Blowfish, Pocket Universe, Scam Sniffer), hardware wallet best practices, multi-wallet strategy, 10-rule security checklist, emergency response steps, 6-question FAQ.

/learn/crypto-market-cycles-guide-2026 — ~790 lines, Intermediate level, covers: 4 cycle phases (Accumulation/Markup/Distribution/Markdown) with color-coded cards, Bitcoin halving timeline table (2012-2028 with prices/ROI), halvings vs global liquidity debate, on-chain indicators table (6 indicators with bull/bear signals), 2026 cycle positioning analysis, altcoin cycle mechanics and sector rotation, strategies per phase, common mistakes, 6-question FAQ.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Wallet security page: title 'Crypto Wallet Security Guide 2026: Scam Protection | degen0x' (56 chars), meta desc targets 'crypto wallet security', 'wallet drainer protection', 'crypto phishing', 'token approval security'. Article + FAQ structured data schemas (6 FAQs). OpenGraph article type with March 24, 2026 publication date.

Market cycles page: title 'Crypto Market Cycles Guide 2026: Bull & Bear Phases | degen0x' (59 chars), meta desc targets 'crypto market cycles', 'bitcoin halving cycle', 'bull bear market crypto 2026'. Article + FAQ structured data schemas (6 FAQs). OpenGraph article type.
Wallet security internal links: /learn/defi-safety-guide-2026, /learn/onchain-identity-guide, /learn/crypto-custody-guide-2026, /wallets, /tools/wallet-security-audit.
Market cycles internal links: /learn/crypto-dca-strategy-guide-2026, /learn/crypto-risk-management-guide-2026, /tools/fear-greed-timeline, /tools/market-heatmap, /tools/dominance-tracker.
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts for controlled rollout.

sections.title: Interactive Component Built
items: Created src/components/WalletSecurityScoreCalculator.tsx — client component with 12-item checklist across 4 categories (Storage & Keys, Security Habits, Protection Tools, Recovery Readiness).
Features: checkbox-based scoring, real-time score out of 100 with letter grade (A+ through F), progress bar, category-level sub-scores, color-coded feedback messages.
Embedded in /learn/crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026 above Table of Contents for immediate engagement.
No external dependencies — pure React state with inline styles matching codebase conventions.

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript compilation: 0 errors in new files (pre-existing TS6200 node_modules conflicts unrelated).
Fixed JSX escape issues in market cycles page (> and < chars in text content).
Fixed apostrophe in WalletSecurityScoreCalculator string literal.
Both pages verified as server components (no 'use client' directive, metadata exports work correctly).
Interactive component verified as client component with 'use client' directive.
